name: Case Study: Social Gathering Incident
history: Relationships sometimes shift into romantic connections. Past conflict in relationships following expressions of anger. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't show concern, people will think I don't care.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must always be attentive to others' needs to be valued.
coping_strategies: Avoidance and withdrawal when feeling overwhelmed or criticized.
situation: An incident at a social gathering resulted in an emotional outburst among friends.
auto_thought: I don't understand why people are upset with me.
behavior: Withdrawal from social interactions and attempts to apologize without resolution.
